signals.headline: Regarding series outcome prediction:** This remains speculative at 2-0
signals.raw:
Regarding series outcome prediction:** This remains speculative at 2-0. While the Cavaliers have a commanding lead, the series is not yet resolved—the Raptors would need to win four consecutive games to advance, which is possible but increasingly unlikely as the series progresses.
